summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory candidates plus hydrated linked refs. No GitHub mutations are planned because close/comment/label are blocked and no PR has complete merge preflight proof, including clean Codex /review evidence.

actions.reason: Broad cross-surface feature/API delta and missing complete merge preflight make automated merge or repair planning unsafe.
Narrow contributor PR appears to be the right fix path for #47264, but it needs final merge preflight rather than immediate merge.
Useful narrow fix path, but rebase/current-main refresh and full merge preflight are still required.
Low-signal docs change has failed proof check and waiting-on-author/rebase state; closure is not allowed and merge is not preflighted.
Useful contributor PR should be repaired on its branch: address docs review comments, refresh against main, then rerun targeted validation and merge preflight.
Keep the issue open and related to #81471 until the fix PR is merged or rejected; post-merge closeout is disabled in this job.
Historical closed context only; the current open fix path is #81471.
Exact linked security-sensitive ref is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup.

needs_human: #78381 needs maintainer judgment because the PR spans 36 files across multiple surfaces and lacks complete merge preflight.
#84115 needs maintainer judgment because it is low-signal docs work with failed proof check, waiting-on-author/rebase state, and closeout is disabled.
